metadata.name: RCSG-FW Domain Authority Reference Instances
metadata.description: Reference instance data for 9 domain authorities and their authority domains, seeded from the NCSC/DSIT Cyber Governance Code of Practice mapping companion document — part of the merged RCSG-FW v2.0.0 ontology
metadata.creator: Azlan EA-AAA

organizations.name: National Cyber Security Centre
organizations.description: UK government agency providing cyber security guidance, incident management, and the Cyber Assessment Framework for critical national infrastructure

organizations.name: Department for Science, Innovation and Technology
organizations.description: UK government department responsible for digital, technology, and innovation policy including cyber governance codes

organizations.name: Information Systems Audit and Control Association
organizations.description: Global professional association for IT governance, risk, audit, and cyber security providing COBIT and CMMI frameworks

organizations.name: National Institute of Standards and Technology
organizations.description: US federal agency developing technology standards including the Cybersecurity Framework and risk management guidelines

organizations.name: IASME Consortium
organizations.description: UK-based SME cyber assurance certification body operating Cyber Essentials and IASME Cyber Assurance standards

organizations.name: Internet Security Alliance
organizations.description: Global organisation focused on board-level cyber risk oversight publishing the ISA Cyber-Risk Oversight Handbook for directors

organizations.name: Agence nationale de la sécurité des systèmes d'information
organizations.description: French national cyber security agency providing the ANSSI 14-Step Approach to cyber governance and resilience

organizations.name: International Organization for Standardization / International Electrotechnical Commission
organizations.description: Joint international standards body publishing ISO/IEC 27001 information security management system and related standards

organizations.name: World Economic Forum
organizations.description: International organisation for public-private cooperation publishing cyber governance frameworks and global risk reports

authorityDomains.domainDescription: National cyber security guidance, incident response, and critical infrastructure protection for the United Kingdom
Government policy for digital infrastructure, technology innovation, and cyber governance regulation
Global IT governance, risk management, audit frameworks including COBIT and CMMI maturity models
Federal technology standards development including cybersecurity frameworks and risk management guidelines
Cyber assurance certification for small and medium enterprises including Cyber Essentials scheme
Director and board-level cyber risk oversight guidance and governance handbooks
National cyber security governance and resilience approach for France including the 14-Step Method
International standards for information security management systems and related controls
International public-private cyber governance cooperation and global risk landscape analysis
